data.body:
Main Story Update Notice

Main Story Vol. 1: Foreclosure Task Force Chapter 3, Part 1: 'Traces of a Dream' has been revealed!
Watch the video of Hoshino's monologue, as she reflects on her journey so far.

⬇️Promotional Video (HD)⬇️
